ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume_k" REAL /* Trading volume of the stock in thousands */,
  "rate_percent" REAL /* Rate of change of the stock price in percent */,
  "pre_market_open" REAL /* Pre-market opening price */,
  "after_market_close" REAL /* After-market closing price */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Actual trading volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "stock_type" INTEGER /* Type of the stock (e.g., technology, finance) */,
  "exchange" INTEGER /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "last_trade_time" TEXT /* Time of the last trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_stock_type FOREIGN KEY ("stock_type") REFERENCES stock_types ("stock_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_types" (
  "stock_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock type */,
  "stock_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "trading_hours_start" TEXT /* Start time of trading hours */,
  "trading_hours_end" TEXT /* End time of trading hours */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the stock */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the stock */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
